name: Incorrect Calculation of Buffer Size
description: The product incorrectly calculates the size needed when allocating a buffer, due to off-by-one errors, integer overflows, or failing to account for data expansion, leading to an undersized buffer that is subsequently overflowed.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[size_calculation] computes a buffer size that is too small (off-by-one, missing null terminator space, integer overflow in multiplication, encoding expansion not accounted for) and passes it to STORAGE[memory_alloc], creating an undersized buffer that subsequent TRANSFORM[write] operations overflow
